euro.title: EUR / USD Currency Exchange
euro.isd_tooltip: ISD corresponds to 5% of the transfer amount. This calculation considers the current exemption of up to 3 Basic Unified Salaries (SBU), applicable within a 15-calendar-day period. The amount shown is referential and may vary at the time of the transaction.
euro.nota_comision: The commission may vary depending on the account type and is subject to the current tariff.
euro.nota_valores: The values shown are referential. The exchange rate, commissions, and applicable taxes may vary at the time of the transaction.
euro.disclaimer: The form request is received until 14:00.
euro.nota_1: Download and complete the corresponding form.
euro.nota_2: Send the signed form in PDF format to: asesoria@bancoprocredit.com.ec, Monday to Friday by 14:00.
euro.info_tasa: The rate shown in the simulator is updated daily and is subject to change.
euro.info_contacto: For additional information about this service, contact us through the following channels:

vivienda.title: Housing loan Simulator
vivienda.sujeta_cambios: Subject to changes and in case of ECO credit, the rate is with previously pre-selected construction companies
vivienda.sujeta_cambios3: *Interest rate subject to discounts in the case of green housing.

general.todos_los_creditos: All the credits of the financial system will be discounted by 0.5% contribution to SOLCA by regulations of the Superintendency of Banks. The values ​​are referential and are subject to calendar days
general.sujeto_a_dias_calendario: *The values ​​are referential and are subject to calendar days
general.monto_minimo_pro_ahorro: The minimum amount of monthly savings is 30 USD
general.cuenta_pro_ahorro: You must have a connected account (Daily or traditional) from where debits are made to the plan
general.interes_pro_ahorro: Normal interest is calculated daily and compounded (credited) each month
general.interes_bono: *Bonus interest is calculated daily and compounded (credited) at the end of the plan
general.depositos_adi: *Additional deposits can be received and both the normal rate and the bonus rate are paid on these
general.plan_permite: *The plan allows up to 3 months of not receiving an accreditation and maintaining the benefit of the bonus rate
general.pasado_3: *After 3 months, if the deposit was not received, the bonus interest is lost
general.precancelacion: *In case of early pre-cancellation, the bonus interest will be lost
general.servicio: * A basic service form (water, electricity or telephone)
general.creditoAPI: * Credit for employees or independent professionals
general.sercliente: * Being a client of Banco ProCredit
general.nocreditovencast: * Not have overdue or written-off credits
general.capacidadpago: * Have the payment capacity under analysis of Banco ProCredit
